<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:住吉綱主]] {{Infobox person|birth_date=0729|death_date={{death date|0805|3|14}}|gender={{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[da:d:Q17220366]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:36, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox noble | name = Tsunanushi Suminoe | image = | image_size = | caption = | period = [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]] to early [[:en:Heian period|Heian period]] | birth_date = [[:en:Tenpyō|Tenpyō]] 1 (729) | death_date = [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 24, {{ill|February 10 (Lunisolar)|ja|2月10日 (旧暦)|qlt=10|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February 10 (Lunisolar)|qq=}} ([[:en:805|805]], [[:en:March 14|March 14]]) | alias = Nawanushi | Ranks = [[Junior Fourth Rank|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade]]; [[Konoe no Shōshō|Captain of the Imperial Guard]] | clan = [[Ikehara clan|Ikehara no Kimi]] → [[Suminoe clan|Suminoe no Asomi]] | parents = | siblings = }}
'''Tsunanushi Suminoe''' (住吉 綱主) was a nobleman of the [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]] to the early [[:en:Heian period|Heian period]]. His [[uji-kabane|clan title]] transitioned from [[Ikehara clan|Ikehara no Kimi]] to [[Suminoe clan|Suminoe no Asomi]]. His name is also recorded as '''Nawanushi'''. He attained the Rank of [[Junior Fourth Rank|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade]] and served as a [[Konoe no Shōshō|Captain of the Imperial Guard]].
== Career == In [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 4 (785), Tsunanushi was granted the Outer [[Junior Fifth Rank]], Lower Grade and appointed [[Konoe no Shōken|Inspector of the Imperial Guard]]. Later that year, he was promoted to [[Outer Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade]]. Serving as a [[Konoe no Shōken|Guard Inspector]], he concurrently held provincial posts, including [[:en:Shimōsa Province|Shimōsa Dajō]] and [[:en:Hitachi Province|Hitachi Dajō]]. In [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 9 (790), he achieved the Inner [[Junior Fifth Rank]], Lower Grade.
In [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 10 (791), Tsunanushi and his brother successfully petitioned for a change in their clan title to reflect their ancestral ties to [[Tōjō Province|Tōjō]] and [[Suminoe District]] (now part of [[:en:Osaka City|Osaka City]]). The family name was changed to Suminoe no Asomi.
Promotions followed steadily: in [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 14 (795), he was elevated to [[Junior Fifth Rank|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade]]; in [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 18 (799), to [[Senior Fifth Rank|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade]]; and eventually to [[Junior Fourth Rank|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade]], serving as [[Konoe no Shōshō|Captain of the Imperial Guard]]. He passed away on [[2nd month]] [[10th day (lunar calendar)|10th day]] of [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 24 (805), aged 77. His final Rank was [[Junior Fourth Rank|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade]].
== Personality and Achievements == Tsunanushi excelled in [[:en:Archery|Archery]], earning him a position in the [[:en:Konoe|Imperial Guard]]. He worked diligently, serving with dedication and gaining the trust of the Guard soldiers. His love of [[:en:Hunting|falconry]] and dogs was noted.<ref name="nihon-koki">*Nihon Kōki*, Enryaku 24, 2nd month, 10th day entry.</ref>
== Appointments == According to the *[[Rikkokushi]]*: * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 4 (785): ** [[9th month]] [[8th day (lunar calendar)|8th day]]: Outer Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade. ** [[10th month]] [[12th day (lunar calendar)|12th day]]: Appointed [[Konoe no Shōken|Inspector of the Imperial Guard]]. ** [[11th month]] [[25th day (lunar calendar)|25th day]]: Outer Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade. * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 8 (789), [[2nd month]] [[4th day (lunar calendar)|4th day]]: Concurrently appointed [[:en:Shimōsa Province|Shimōsa Dajō]]. * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 9 (790), [[2nd month]] [[26th day (lunar calendar)|26th day]]: Promoted to Inner Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade. * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 10 (791): ** [[1st month]] [[22nd day (lunar calendar)|22nd day]]: Concurrently appointed [[:en:Hitachi Province|Hitachi Dajō]]. ** [[4th month]] [[5th day (lunar calendar)|5th day]]: Name changed to Suminoe no Asomi. * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 14 (795), [[10th month]] [[28th day (lunar calendar)|28th day]]: Promoted to Inner Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade. * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 18 (799), [[5th month]] [[8th day (lunar calendar)|8th day]]: Promoted to Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade. * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 24 (805): ** [[1st month]] [[21st day (lunar calendar)|21st day]]: One person granted an official stipend. ** [[2nd month]] [[10th day (lunar calendar)|10th day]]: Passed away.
== References == * [[Ujitani Mitsuru|Mitsuru Ujitani]], ''Zoku Nihon Kōki (Lower Volume)'', [[:en:Kodansha|Kodansha]] Academic Library, 1995. * [[Morita Yasushi|Yasushi Morita]], ''Nihon Kōki (Upper Volume)'', Kodansha Academic Library, 2006.

'''Tsunanushi Suminoe''' (住吉 綱主) was a nobleman of the [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]] to the early [[:en:Heian period|Heian period]]. His [[uji-kabane|clan title]] transitioned from [[Ikehara clan|Ikehara no Kimi]] to [[Suminoe clan|Suminoe no Asomi]]. His name is also recorded as '''Nawanushi'''. He attained the Rank of [[Junior Fourth Rank|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade]] and served as a [[Konoe no Shōshō|Captain of the Imperial Guard]].
== Career == In [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 4 (785), Tsunanushi was granted the Outer [[Junior Fifth Rank]], Lower Grade and appointed [[Konoe no Shōken|Inspector of the Imperial Guard]]. Later that year, he was promoted to [[Outer Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade]]. Serving as a [[Konoe no Shōken|Guard Inspector]], he concurrently held provincial posts, including [[:en:Shimōsa Province|Shimōsa Dajō]] and [[:en:Hitachi Province|Hitachi Dajō]]. In [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 9 (790), he achieved the Inner [[Junior Fifth Rank]], Lower Grade.
In [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 10 (791), Tsunanushi and his brother successfully petitioned for a change in their clan title to reflect their ancestral ties to [[Tōjō Province|Tōjō]] and [[Suminoe District]] (now part of [[:en:Osaka City|Osaka City]]). The family name was changed to Suminoe no Asomi.
Promotions followed steadily: in [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 14 (795), he was elevated to [[Junior Fifth Rank|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade]]; in [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 18 (799), to [[Senior Fifth Rank|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade]]; and eventually to [[Junior Fourth Rank|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade]], serving as [[Konoe no Shōshō|Captain of the Imperial Guard]]. He passed away on [[2nd month]] [[10th day (lunar calendar)|10th day]] of [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 24 (805), aged 77. His final Rank was [[Junior Fourth Rank|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade]].
== Personality and Achievements == Tsunanushi excelled in [[:en:Archery|Archery]], earning him a position in the [[:en:Konoe|Imperial Guard]]. He worked diligently, serving with dedication and gaining the trust of the Guard soldiers. His love of [[:en:Hunting|falconry]] and dogs was noted.<ref name="nihon-koki">*Nihon Kōki*, Enryaku 24, 2nd month, 10th day entry.</ref>

He passed away on [[2nd month]] [[10th day (lunar calendar)|10th day]] of [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 24 (805), aged 77. His final Rank was [[Junior Fourth Rank|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade]].
== Personality and Achievements == Tsunanushi excelled in [[:en:Archery|Archery]], earning him a position in the [[:en:Konoe|Imperial Guard]]. He worked diligently, serving with dedication and gaining the trust of the Guard soldiers. His love of [[:en:Hunting|falconry]] and dogs was noted.<ref name="nihon-koki">*Nihon Kōki*, Enryaku 24, 2nd month, 10th day entry.</ref>
== Appointments == According to the *[[Rikkokushi]]*: * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 4 (785): ** [[9th month]] [[8th day (lunar calendar)|8th day]]: Outer Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade. ** [[10th month]] [[12th day (lunar calendar)|12th day]]: Appointed [[Konoe no Shōken|Inspector of the Imperial Guard]]. ** [[11th month]] [[25th day (lunar calendar)|25th day]]: Outer Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade. * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 8 (789), [[2nd month]] [[4th day (lunar calendar)|4th day]]: Concurrently appointed [[:en:Shimōsa Province|Shimōsa Dajō]]. * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 9 (790), [[2nd month]] [[26th day (lunar calendar)|26th day]]: Promoted to Inner Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade. * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 10 (791): ** [[1st month]] [[22nd day (lunar calendar)|22nd day]]: Concurrently appointed [[:en:Hitachi Province|Hitachi Dajō]]. ** [[4th month]] [[5th day (lunar calendar)|5th day]]: Name changed to Suminoe no Asomi. * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 14 (795), [[10th month]] [[28th day (lunar calendar)|28th day]]: Promoted to Inner Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade. * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 18 (799), [[5th month]] [[8th day (lunar calendar)|8th day]]: Promoted to Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade. * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 24 (805): ** [[1st month]] [[21st day (lunar calendar)|21st day]]: One person granted an official stipend. ** [[2nd month]] [[10th day (lunar calendar)|10th day]]: Passed away.

He attained the Rank of [[Junior Fourth Rank|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade]] and served as a [[Konoe no Shōshō|Captain of the Imperial Guard]].

Later that year, he was promoted to [[Outer Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade]]. Serving as a [[Konoe no Shōken|Guard Inspector]], he concurrently held provincial posts, including [[:en:Shimōsa Province|Shimōsa Dajō]] and [[:en:Hitachi Province|Hitachi Dajō]]. In [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 9 (790), he achieved the Inner [[Junior Fifth Rank]], Lower Grade.

He passed away on [[2nd month]] [[10th day (lunar calendar)|10th day]] of [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 24 (805), aged 77. His final Rank was [[Junior Fourth Rank|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade]].
== Personality and Achievements == Tsunanushi excelled in [[:en:Archery|Archery]], earning him a position in the [[:en:Konoe|Imperial Guard]]. He worked diligently, serving with dedication and gaining the trust of the Guard soldiers. His love of [[:en:Hunting|falconry]] and dogs was noted.<ref name="nihon-koki">*Nihon Kōki*, Enryaku 24, 2nd month, 10th day entry.</ref>

'''Tsunanushi Suminoe''' (住吉 綱主) was a nobleman of the [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]] to the early [[:en:Heian period|Heian period]]. His [[uji-kabane|clan title]] transitioned from [[Ikehara clan|Ikehara no Kimi]] to [[Suminoe clan|Suminoe no Asomi]]. His name is also recorded as '''Nawanushi'''. He attained the Rank of [[Junior Fourth Rank|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade]] and served as a [[Konoe no Shōshō|Captain of the Imperial Guard]].
== Career == In [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 4 (785), Tsunanushi was granted the Outer [[Junior Fifth Rank]], Lower Grade and appointed [[Konoe no Shōken|Inspector of the Imperial Guard]]. Later that year, he was promoted to [[Outer Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade]]. Serving as a [[Konoe no Shōken|Guard Inspector]], he concurrently held provincial posts, including [[:en:Shimōsa Province|Shimōsa Dajō]] and [[:en:Hitachi Province|Hitachi Dajō]]. In [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 9 (790), he achieved the Inner [[Junior Fifth Rank]], Lower Grade.
In [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 10 (791), Tsunanushi and his brother successfully petitioned for a change in their clan title to reflect their ancestral ties to [[Tōjō Province|Tōjō]] and [[Suminoe District]] (now part of [[:en:Osaka City|Osaka City]]). The family name was changed to Suminoe no Asomi.
Promotions followed steadily: in [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 14 (795), he was elevated to [[Junior Fifth Rank|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade]]; in [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 18 (799), to [[Senior Fifth Rank|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade]]; and eventually to [[Junior Fourth Rank|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade]], serving as [[Konoe no Shōshō|Captain of the Imperial Guard]]. He passed away on [[2nd month]] [[10th day (lunar calendar)|10th day]] of [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 24 (805), aged 77. His final Rank was [[Junior Fourth Rank|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade]].
== Personality and Achievements == Tsunanushi excelled in [[:en:Archery|Archery]], earning him a position in the [[:en:Konoe|Imperial Guard]]. He worked diligently, serving with dedication and gaining the trust of the Guard soldiers. His love of [[:en:Hunting|falconry]] and dogs was noted.<ref name="nihon-koki">*Nihon Kōki*, Enryaku 24, 2nd month, 10th day entry.</ref>
== Appointments == According to the *[[Rikkokushi]]*: * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 4 (785): ** [[9th month]] [[8th day (lunar calendar)|8th day]]: Outer Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade. ** [[10th month]] [[12th day (lunar calendar)|12th day]]: Appointed [[Konoe no Shōken|Inspector of the Imperial Guard]]. ** [[11th month]] [[25th day (lunar calendar)|25th day]]: Outer Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade. * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 8 (789), [[2nd month]] [[4th day (lunar calendar)|4th day]]: Concurrently appointed [[:en:Shimōsa Province|Shimōsa Dajō]]. * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 9 (790), [[2nd month]] [[26th day (lunar calendar)|26th day]]: Promoted to Inner Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade. * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 10 (791): ** [[1st month]] [[22nd day (lunar calendar)|22nd day]]: Concurrently appointed [[:en:Hitachi Province|Hitachi Dajō]]. ** [[4th month]] [[5th day (lunar calendar)|5th day]]: Name changed to Suminoe no Asomi. * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 14 (795), [[10th month]] [[28th day (lunar calendar)|28th day]]: Promoted to Inner Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade. * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 18 (799), [[5th month]] [[8th day (lunar calendar)|8th day]]: Promoted to Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade. * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 24 (805): ** [[1st month]] [[21st day (lunar calendar)|21st day]]: One person granted an official stipend. ** [[2nd month]] [[10th day (lunar calendar)|10th day]]: Passed away.
== References == * [[Ujitani Mitsuru|Mitsuru Ujitani]], ''Zoku Nihon Kōki (Lower Volume)'', [[:en:Kodansha|Kodansha]] Academic Library, 1995. * [[Morita Yasushi|Yasushi Morita]], ''Nihon Kōki (Upper Volume)'', Kodansha Academic Library, 2006.
{{translated page|ja|住吉綱主|version=86853987|comment=Imported full ja history}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:住吉綱主]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:住吉綱主]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:住吉綱主]] {{Infobox person|birth_date=0729|death_date={{death date|0805|3|14}}|gender={{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q17220366]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:36, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox noble | name = Tsunanushi Suminoe | image = | image_size = | caption = | period = [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]] to early [[:en:Heian period|Heian period]] | birth_date = [[:en:Tenpyō|Tenpyō]] 1 (729) | death_date = [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 24, {{ill|February 10 (Lunisolar)|ja|2月10日 (旧暦)|qlt=10|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February 10 (Lunisolar)|qq=}} ([[:en:805|805]], [[:en:March 14|March 14]]) | alias = Nawanushi | Ranks = [[Junior Fourth Rank|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade]]; [[Konoe no Shōshō|Captain of the Imperial Guard]] | clan = [[Ikehara clan|Ikehara no Kimi]] → [[Suminoe clan|Suminoe no Asomi]] | parents = | siblings = }}
'''Tsunanushi Suminoe''' (住吉 綱主) was a nobleman of the [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]] to the early [[:en:Heian period|Heian period]]. His [[uji-kabane|clan title]] transitioned from [[Ikehara clan|Ikehara no Kimi]] to [[Suminoe clan|Suminoe no Asomi]]. His name is also recorded as '''Nawanushi'''. He attained the Rank of [[Junior Fourth Rank|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade]] and served as a [[Konoe no Shōshō|Captain of the Imperial Guard]].
== Career == In [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 4 (785), Tsunanushi was granted the Outer [[Junior Fifth Rank]], Lower Grade and appointed [[Konoe no Shōken|Inspector of the Imperial Guard]]. Later that year, he was promoted to [[Outer Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade]]. Serving as a [[Konoe no Shōken|Guard Inspector]], he concurrently held provincial posts, including [[:en:Shimōsa Province|Shimōsa Dajō]] and [[:en:Hitachi Province|Hitachi Dajō]]. In [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 9 (790), he achieved the Inner [[Junior Fifth Rank]], Lower Grade.
In [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 10 (791), Tsunanushi and his brother successfully petitioned for a change in their clan title to reflect their ancestral ties to [[Tōjō Province|Tōjō]] and [[Suminoe District]] (now part of [[:en:Osaka City|Osaka City]]). The family name was changed to Suminoe no Asomi.
Promotions followed steadily: in [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 14 (795), he was elevated to [[Junior Fifth Rank|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade]]; in [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 18 (799), to [[Senior Fifth Rank|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade]]; and eventually to [[Junior Fourth Rank|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade]], serving as [[Konoe no Shōshō|Captain of the Imperial Guard]]. He passed away on [[2nd month]] [[10th day (lunar calendar)|10th day]] of [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 24 (805), aged 77. His final Rank was [[Junior Fourth Rank|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade]].
== Personality and Achievements == Tsunanushi excelled in [[:en:Archery|Archery]], earning him a position in the [[:en:Konoe|Imperial Guard]]. He worked diligently, serving with dedication and gaining the trust of the Guard soldiers. His love of [[:en:Hunting|falconry]] and dogs was noted.<ref name="nihon-koki">*Nihon Kōki*, Enryaku 24, 2nd month, 10th day entry.</ref>
== Appointments == According to the *[[Rikkokushi]]*: * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 4 (785): ** [[9th month]] [[8th day (lunar calendar)|8th day]]: Outer Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade. ** [[10th month]] [[12th day (lunar calendar)|12th day]]: Appointed [[Konoe no Shōken|Inspector of the Imperial Guard]]. ** [[11th month]] [[25th day (lunar calendar)|25th day]]: Outer Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade. * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 8 (789), [[2nd month]] [[4th day (lunar calendar)|4th day]]: Concurrently appointed [[:en:Shimōsa Province|Shimōsa Dajō]]. * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 9 (790), [[2nd month]] [[26th day (lunar calendar)|26th day]]: Promoted to Inner Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade. * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 10 (791): ** [[1st month]] [[22nd day (lunar calendar)|22nd day]]: Concurrently appointed [[:en:Hitachi Province|Hitachi Dajō]]. ** [[4th month]] [[5th day (lunar calendar)|5th day]]: Name changed to Suminoe no Asomi. * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 14 (795), [[10th month]] [[28th day (lunar calendar)|28th day]]: Promoted to Inner Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade. * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 18 (799), [[5th month]] [[8th day (lunar calendar)|8th day]]: Promoted to Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade. * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 24 (805): ** [[1st month]] [[21st day (lunar calendar)|21st day]]: One person granted an official stipend. ** [[2nd month]] [[10th day (lunar calendar)|10th day]]: Passed away.
== References == * [[Ujitani Mitsuru|Mitsuru Ujitani]], ''Zoku Nihon Kōki (Lower Volume)'', [[:en:Kodansha|Kodansha]] Academic Library, 1995. * [[Morita Yasushi|Yasushi Morita]], ''Nihon Kōki (Upper Volume)'', Kodansha Academic Library, 2006.

'''Tsunanushi Suminoe''' (住吉 綱主) was a nobleman of the {{ill|Nara period|en|Nara period|WD=Q189178|lt=Nara period}} to the early {{ill|Heian period|en|Heian period|WD=Q193292|lt=Heian period}}. His [[uji-kabane|clan title]] transitioned from [[Ikehara clan|Ikehara no Kimi]] to [[Suminoe clan|Suminoe no Asomi]]. His name is also recorded as '''Nawanushi'''. He attained the Rank of [[Junior Fourth Rank|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade]] and served as a [[Konoe no Shōshō|Captain of the Imperial Guard]].
== Career == In {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku}} 4 (785), Tsunanushi was granted the Outer [[Junior Fifth Rank]], Lower Grade and appointed [[Konoe no Shōken|Inspector of the Imperial Guard]]. Later that year, he was promoted to [[Outer Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade]]. Serving as a [[Konoe no Shōken|Guard Inspector]], he concurrently held provincial posts, including {{ill|Shimōsa Province|en|Shimōsa Province|WD=Q1053695|lt=Shimōsa Dajō}} and {{ill|Hitachi Province|en|Hitachi Province|WD=Q1055353|lt=Hitachi Dajō}}. In {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku}} 9 (790), he achieved the Inner [[Junior Fifth Rank]], Lower Grade.
In {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku}} 10 (791), Tsunanushi and his brother successfully petitioned for a change in their clan title to reflect their ancestral ties to [[Tōjō Province|Tōjō]] and [[Suminoe District]] (now part of [[:en:Osaka City|Osaka City]]). The family name was changed to Suminoe no Asomi.
Promotions followed steadily: in {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku}} 14 (795), he was elevated to [[Junior Fifth Rank|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade]]; in {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku}} 18 (799), to [[Senior Fifth Rank|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade]]; and eventually to [[Junior Fourth Rank|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade]], serving as [[Konoe no Shōshō|Captain of the Imperial Guard]]. He passed away on [[2nd month]] [[10th day (lunar calendar)|10th day]] of {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku}} 24 (805), aged 77. His final Rank was [[Junior Fourth Rank|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade]].
== Personality and Achievements == Tsunanushi excelled in {{ill|Archery|en|Archery|WD=Q108429|lt=Archery}}, earning him a position in the {{ill|Konoe|en|Konoe|WD=Q21492310|lt=Imperial Guard}}. He worked diligently, serving with dedication and gaining the trust of the Guard soldiers. His love of {{ill|Hunting|en|Hunting|WD=Q36963|lt=falconry}} and dogs was noted.<ref name="nihon-koki">*Nihon Kōki*, Enryaku 24, 2nd month, 10th day entry.</ref>
== Appointments == According to the *[[Rikkokushi]]*: * {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku}} 4 (785): ** [[9th month]] [[8th day (lunar calendar)|8th day]]: Outer Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade. ** [[10th month]] [[12th day (lunar calendar)|12th day]]: Appointed [[Konoe no Shōken|Inspector of the Imperial Guard]]. ** [[11th month]] [[25th day (lunar calendar)|25th day]]: Outer Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade. * {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku}} 8 (789), [[2nd month]] [[4th day (lunar calendar)|4th day]]: Concurrently appointed {{ill|Shimōsa Province|en|Shimōsa Province|WD=Q1053695|lt=Shimōsa Dajō}}. * {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku}} 9 (790), [[2nd month]] [[26th day (lunar calendar)|26th day]]: Promoted to Inner Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade. * {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku}} 10 (791): ** [[1st month]] [[22nd day (lunar calendar)|22nd day]]: Concurrently appointed {{ill|Hitachi Province|en|Hitachi Province|WD=Q1055353|lt=Hitachi Dajō}}. ** [[4th month]] [[5th day (lunar calendar)|5th day]]: Name changed to Suminoe no Asomi. * {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku}} 14 (795), [[10th month]] [[28th day (lunar calendar)|28th day]]: Promoted to Inner Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade. * {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku}} 18 (799), [[5th month]] [[8th day (lunar calendar)|8th day]]: Promoted to Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade. * {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku}} 24 (805): ** [[1st month]] [[21st day (lunar calendar)|21st day]]: One person granted an official stipend. ** [[2nd month]] [[10th day (lunar calendar)|10th day]]: Passed away.
== References == * [[Ujitani Mitsuru|Mitsuru Ujitani]], ''Zoku Nihon Kōki (Lower Volume)'', {{ill|Kodansha|en|Kodansha|WD=Q726081|lt=Kodansha}} Academic Library, 1995. * [[Morita Yasushi|Yasushi Morita]], ''Nihon Kōki (Upper Volume)'', Kodansha Academic Library, 2006.

== Personality and Achievements == Tsunanushi excelled in {{ill|Archery|en|Archery|WD=Q108429|lt=Archery|1=Archery}}, earning him a position in the {{ill|Konoe|en|Konoe|WD=Q21492310|lt=Imperial Guard|1=Konoe}}. He worked diligently, serving with dedication and gaining the trust of the Guard soldiers. His love of {{ill|Hunting|en|Hunting|WD=Q36963|lt=falconry|1=Hunting}} and dogs was noted.<ref name="nihon-koki">*Nihon Kōki*, Enryaku 24, 2nd month, 10th day entry.</ref>
== Appointments == According to the *[[Rikkokushi]]*: * {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku|1=Enryaku}} 4 (785): ** [[9th month]] [[8th day (lunar calendar)|8th day]]: Outer Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade. ** [[10th month]] [[12th day (lunar calendar)|12th day]]: Appointed [[Konoe no Shōken|Inspector of the Imperial Guard]]. ** [[11th month]] [[25th day (lunar calendar)|25th day]]: Outer Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade. * {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku|1=Enryaku}} 8 (789), [[2nd month]] [[4th day (lunar calendar)|4th day]]: Concurrently appointed {{ill|Shimōsa Province|en|Shimōsa Province|WD=Q1053695|lt=Shimōsa Dajō|1=Shimōsa Province}}. * {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku|1=Enryaku}} 9 (790), [[2nd month]] [[26th day (lunar calendar)|26th day]]: Promoted to Inner Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade. * {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku|1=Enryaku}} 10 (791): ** [[1st month]] [[22nd day (lunar calendar)|22nd day]]: Concurrently appointed {{ill|Hitachi Province|en|Hitachi Province|WD=Q1055353|lt=Hitachi Dajō|1=Hitachi Province}}. ** [[4th month]] [[5th day (lunar calendar)|5th day]]: Name changed to Suminoe no Asomi. * {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku|1=Enryaku}} 14 (795), [[10th month]] [[28th day (lunar calendar)|28th day]]: Promoted to Inner Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade. * {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku|1=Enryaku}} 18 (799), [[5th month]] [[8th day (lunar calendar)|8th day]]: Promoted to Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade. * {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku|1=Enryaku}} 24 (805): ** [[1st month]] [[21st day (lunar calendar)|21st day]]: One person granted an official stipend. ** [[2nd month]] [[10th day (lunar calendar)|10th day]]: Passed away.
== References == * [[Ujitani Mitsuru|Mitsuru Ujitani]], ''Zoku Nihon Kōki (Lower Volume)'', {{ill|Kodansha|en|Kodansha|WD=Q726081|lt=Kodansha|1=Kodansha}} Academic Library, 1995. * [[Morita Yasushi|Yasushi Morita]], ''Nihon Kōki (Upper Volume)'', Kodansha Academic Library, 2006.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:住吉綱主]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:住吉綱主]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:住吉綱主]] {{Infobox person|birth_date=0729|death_date={{death date|0805|3|14}}|gender={{ill|male|WD=Q6581097|1=Male (gender)}}}} {{Infobox noble | name = Tsunanushi Suminoe | image = | image_size = | caption = | period = {{ill|Nara period|en|Nara period|WD=Q189178|lt=Nara period|1=Nara period}} to early {{ill|Heian period|en|Heian period|WD=Q193292|lt=Heian period|1=Heian period}} | birth_date = {{ill|Tenpyō|en|Tenpyō|WD=Q1199879|lt=Tenpyō|1=Tenpyō}} 1 (729) | death_date = {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku|1=Enryaku}} 24, {{ill|February 10 (Lunisolar)|ja|2月10日 (旧暦)|qlt=10|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February 10 (Lunisolar)|qq=}} ({{ill|805|en|805|WD=Q30389|lt=805|1=805}}, {{ill|March 14|en|March 14|WD=Q2404|lt=March 14|1=March 14}}) | alias = Nawanushi | Ranks = [[Junior Fourth Rank|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade]]; [[Konoe no Shōshō|Captain of the Imperial Guard]] | clan = [[Ikehara clan|Ikehara no Kimi]] → [[Suminoe clan|Suminoe no Asomi]] | parents = | siblings = }}
'''Tsunanushi Suminoe''' (住吉 綱主) was a nobleman of the {{ill|Nara period|en|Nara period|WD=Q189178|lt=Nara period|1=Nara period}} to the early {{ill|Heian period|en|Heian period|WD=Q193292|lt=Heian period|1=Heian period}}. His [[uji-kabane|clan title]] transitioned from [[Ikehara clan|Ikehara no Kimi]] to [[Suminoe clan|Suminoe no Asomi]]. His name is also recorded as '''Nawanushi'''. He attained the Rank of [[Junior Fourth Rank|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade]] and served as a [[Konoe no Shōshō|Captain of the Imperial Guard]].
== Career == In {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku|1=Enryaku}} 4 (785), Tsunanushi was granted the Outer [[Junior Fifth Rank]], Lower Grade and appointed [[Konoe no Shōken|Inspector of the Imperial Guard]]. Later that year, he was promoted to [[Outer Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade]]. Serving as a [[Konoe no Shōken|Guard Inspector]], he concurrently held provincial posts, including {{ill|Shimōsa Province|en|Shimōsa Province|WD=Q1053695|lt=Shimōsa Dajō|1=Shimōsa Province}} and {{ill|Hitachi Province|en|Hitachi Province|WD=Q1055353|lt=Hitachi Dajō|1=Hitachi Province}}. In {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku|1=Enryaku}} 9 (790), he achieved the Inner [[Junior Fifth Rank]], Lower Grade.
In {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku|1=Enryaku}} 10 (791), Tsunanushi and his brother successfully petitioned for a change in their clan title to reflect their ancestral ties to [[Tōjō Province|Tōjō]] and [[Suminoe District]] (now part of [[:en:Osaka City|Osaka City]]). The family name was changed to Suminoe no Asomi.
Promotions followed steadily: in {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku|1=Enryaku}} 14 (795), he was elevated to [[Junior Fifth Rank|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade]]; in {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku|1=Enryaku}} 18 (799), to [[Senior Fifth Rank|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade]]; and eventually to [[Junior Fourth Rank|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade]], serving as [[Konoe no Shōshō|Captain of the Imperial Guard]]. He passed away on [[2nd month]] [[10th day (lunar calendar)|10th day]] of {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku|1=Enryaku}} 24 (805), aged 77. His final Rank was [[Junior Fourth Rank|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade]].
== Personality and Achievements == Tsunanushi excelled in {{ill|Archery|en|Archery|WD=Q108429|lt=Archery|1=Archery}}, earning him a position in the {{ill|Konoe|en|Konoe|WD=Q21492310|lt=Imperial Guard|1=Konoe}}. He worked diligently, serving with dedication and gaining the trust of the Guard soldiers. His love of {{ill|Hunting|en|Hunting|WD=Q36963|lt=falconry|1=Hunting}} and dogs was noted.<ref name="nihon-koki">*Nihon Kōki*, Enryaku 24, 2nd month, 10th day entry.</ref>
== Appointments == According to the *[[Rikkokushi]]*: * {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku|1=Enryaku}} 4 (785): ** [[9th month]] [[8th day (lunar calendar)|8th day]]: Outer Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade. ** [[10th month]] [[12th day (lunar calendar)|12th day]]: Appointed [[Konoe no Shōken|Inspector of the Imperial Guard]]. ** [[11th month]] [[25th day (lunar calendar)|25th day]]: Outer Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade. * {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku|1=Enryaku}} 8 (789), [[2nd month]] [[4th day (lunar calendar)|4th day]]: Concurrently appointed {{ill|Shimōsa Province|en|Shimōsa Province|WD=Q1053695|lt=Shimōsa Dajō|1=Shimōsa Province}}. * {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku|1=Enryaku}} 9 (790), [[2nd month]] [[26th day (lunar calendar)|26th day]]: Promoted to Inner Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade. * {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku|1=Enryaku}} 10 (791): ** [[1st month]] [[22nd day (lunar calendar)|22nd day]]: Concurrently appointed {{ill|Hitachi Province|en|Hitachi Province|WD=Q1055353|lt=Hitachi Dajō|1=Hitachi Province}}. ** [[4th month]] [[5th day (lunar calendar)|5th day]]: Name changed to Suminoe no Asomi. * {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku|1=Enryaku}} 14 (795), [[10th month]] [[28th day (lunar calendar)|28th day]]: Promoted to Inner Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade. * {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku|1=Enryaku}} 18 (799), [[5th month]] [[8th day (lunar calendar)|8th day]]: Promoted to Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade. * {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku|1=Enryaku}} 24 (805): ** [[1st month]] [[21st day (lunar calendar)|21st day]]: One person granted an official stipend. ** [[2nd month]] [[10th day (lunar calendar)|10th day]]: Passed away.
== References == * [[Ujitani Mitsuru|Mitsuru Ujitani]], ''Zoku Nihon Kōki (Lower Volume)'', {{ill|Kodansha|en|Kodansha|WD=Q726081|lt=Kodansha|1=Kodansha}} Academic Library, 1995. * [[Morita Yasushi|Yasushi Morita]], ''Nihon Kōki (Upper Volume)'', Kodansha Academic Library, 2006.
